author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Equip RecHitTools to work for a single HGCal detector as in ColdBox setup (forward port of #51180)

#### PR validation:

Use the runTheMatrix test workflows

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to CMSSW_20_0_X
title: Phase2-hgx367B1 Equip RecHitTools to work for a single HGCal detector as in ColdBox setup (forward port of #51180)
